title: Light rain forecast for Garden Route and Karoo, with warnings of heavy rain in other regions
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest weather forecast from the South African Weather Service, severe weather alerts have been given for disruptive rainfall over Gauteng, North West & the north eastern parts of Free State.


> Impact based warnings:


- Orange Level 5 Warning: Disruptive Rainfall resulting in flooding of informal settlements, low-lying areas and bridges as well as dirt roads is expected over the western parts of the North West as well as the central parts of the Free State.
- Yellow Level 4 Warning: Disruptive Rainfall resulting in flooding of informal settlements, low-lying areas and bridges as well as dirt roads is expected over the north-eastern parts of the North West as well as the northern parts of Gauteng.
- Yellow Level 2 Warning: Disruptive Rainfall resulting in Localized flooding of informal settlements, low-lying areas and bridges as well as dirt roads, is expected over the south-eastern parts of the North West, southern parts of Gauteng as well as the eastern parts of Mpumalanga and Free State.
- Yellow Level 2 Warning: Severe Thunderstorm resulting in localised damage to infrastructure, settlements(informal), property, vehicles, livelihood and livestock as well as Localised flooding of susceptible roads, low-lying areas and bridges over the eastern parts of Eastern Cape.
- Yellow Level 1 Warning: Damaging winds resulting in difficulty navigating seas between Lamberts Bay and Cape Agulhas.


> Fire danger warnings


Extremely high fire danger conditions are expected over the northern parts of the Western Cape and the extreme western parts of the Northern Cape.


> Advisories:


Isolated to scattered showers and thundershowers over the central and eastern parts of South Africa, but widespread in the extreme north-eastern and central parts, with the associated severe weather alerts.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
